# The Happy Class

> Making something good even better.

The Happy Class for Couples is a DIY alternative to couples counseling. It's a physical product — a kit that couples do together at home. Not therapy. Not fixing. Just a structured, guided way to have the conversations that matter.

## What It Is

A beautifully designed box with guided prompts, reflection exercises, and a framework for couples to check in with each other. Pink paper (about your partner) and blue paper (about yourself) — then come together and share.

## Who It's For

Couples who are good but want to be great. People who don't need a therapist but do need better structure for the conversations they've been putting off.

## Who Made It

Created by Sandra Weise — life coach with 20+ years of experience, entrepreneur, and host of the "A Better Question" podcast.

- Sandra's website: https://sandraweise.com
- Podcast: A Better Question

## Timeline

- Couples kit: October 2026
- Expansion (friends, siblings, parents): 2027

## Validation

Focus-grouped with 100 men. 50% left written feedback — an unheard-of response rate. Men loved the name and the non-threatening framing.

## Contact

- Website: https://thehappyclass.com
- Sandra: sandra@sandraweise.com
